_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: The Cronbach's alpha of the total score and the subdomains were all above 0.90, indicating high internal consistency.
details: High internal consistency with Cronbach's alpha above 0.90 for total score (0.96) and all subdomains (Functioning: 0.93, Emotions: 0.93, Symptoms: 0.91)
